name: C WorldWide Emerging Markets KL
summary: C WorldWide Emerging Markets KL is an open ended equity fund of funds launched by Carnegie Kapitalforvaltning AS. It is managed by C WorldWide Asset Management Fondsmaeglerselskab A/S. The fund invests in funds which invest in public equity markets of emerging markets of Eastern Europe. It invests in funds which invest in stocks of companies operating across diversified sectors. The fund invests in funds stocks of companies. It benchmarks the performance of its portfolio against the MSCI Eastern Europe Index. C WorldWide Emerging Markets KL was formed on November 7, 1996 and is domiciled in Denmark.
